title: picris hieracioides var. leteae
intro: Picris hieracioides var. leteae is a variety of Picris hieracioides, a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), commonly known as the hawk's beard or bitter chicory. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Picris hieracioides var. leteae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
